name: @onflow/cadence-language-server-v2
description: Cadence Language Server v2 — WASM + Web Worker bridge

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../../languageserver && GOARCH=wasm GOOS=js go build -tags no_cgo -o ../npm-packages/cadence-language-server-v2/dist/cadence-language-server.wasm ./cmd/lsp-v2/
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:wasm
